RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0004 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Liam Cohen SSN: [REDACTED] Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 93,979 2 Federal income tax withheld 14,408 3 Social security wages 46,142 4 Social security tax withheld 8,082 5 Medicare wages and tips 81,768 6 Medicare tax withheld 1,692
